articles.title_en: Yerevan announced that there were no problems with gas supplies from Russia
articles.lead_en: Minister of Territorial Administration and Infrastructure David Khudatyan did not comment on the issue of a possible price increase and assured that interaction between partners is “in the natural working channel”
articles.title_raw: В Ереване заявили об отсутствии проблем с поставками газа из России

articles.title_en: Zelensky imposed sanctions against 31 companies from Russia, the CIS and the UAE
articles.lead_en: They have spread to military-industrial complex enterprises, electronic warfare manufacturers, oil, gas and gold production companies.

articles.title_en: Izvestia: Ghana is considering the possibility of increasing purchases of fertilizers from the Russian Federation
articles.lead_en: According to the newspaper, the republic is interested in this because China has suspended the export of fertilizers due to the war in Iran
articles.title_raw: "Известия": Гана рассматривает возможность увеличить закупки удобрений РФ
articles.lead_raw: По данным газеты, республика заинтересована в этом, поскольку Китай приостановил экспорт удобрений из-за войны в Иране

articles.title_en: Likhachev: The Russian Federation predicts long-term profits from cooperation on nuclear power plants in Kazakhstan
articles.lead_en: The head of Rosatom noted that negotiations are underway on the creation of a research reactor and on the localization in the republic of competencies related to the production of equipment for nuclear power plants

articles.title_en: Ukrainian drones kill two in Russia. Lukoil refinery catches fire.

articles.title_en: ISS partners decided to continue operation until 2030
articles.lead_en: In 2023, the Government of the Russian Federation approved the continued operation of the Russian segment of the station with a crew until 2028, according to the report of the S.P. Rocket and Space Corporation Energia.
articles.title_raw: Партнеры по МКС решили продолжить эксплуатацию до 2030 года
articles.lead_raw: Правительство РФ в 2023 году одобрило продолжение эксплуатации российского сегмента станции с экипажем до 2028 года, говорится в отчете Ракетно-космической корпорации "Энергия" имени С. П.

articles.title_en: New Latvian government confirmed after Ukrainian drone incursion from Russia collapses coalition
articles.lead_en: Latvia’s parliament, the Saeima, confirmed a new government at a special session, with Andris Kulbergs taking office as prime minister. Kulbergs leads the United List, a former opposition party.

articles.title_en: A new Meduza analysis finds Ukraine’s long-range strikes are reaching twice as deep but not surging in 2026. Russia’s refineries, meanwhile, keep bouncing back.
articles.lead_en: A series of large-scale strikes by the Ukrainian Armed Forces (UAF) on Bryansk, Moscow, Perm, Tuapse, and many other targets deep inside Russia has left a clear impression: Kyiv’s long-range campaign is hitting harder than it used to. The images are certainly vivid: “oil rain” blanketing an entire city, a mass drone raid on Russia’s capital, and refineries under near constant attack.
articles.title_raw: A new Meduza analysis finds Ukraine’s long-range strikes are reaching twice as deep but not surging in 2026. Russia’s refineries, meanwhile, keep bouncing back.
articles.lead_raw: A series of large-scale strikes by the Ukrainian Armed Forces (UAF) on Bryansk, Moscow, Perm, Tuapse, and many other targets deep inside Russia has left a clear impression: Kyiv’s long-range campaign is hitting harder than it used to. The images are certainly vivid: “oil rain” blanketing an entire city, a mass drone raid on Russia’s capital, and refineries under near constant attack.
